bluetooth_confirm.title: Govee {model}
bluetooth_confirm.description: Do you want to set up the Govee {model} found via Bluetooth?

abort.not_supported: This device is not a supported Govee model

content_xor_capture.message: Provide exactly one of content or capture current.

delete_needs_id_or_name.message: Provide exactly one of id or name.

rename_needs_id_or_from.message: Provide exactly one of id or current name.

segments_unsupported.message: This device does not support segment effects.

diy_unsupported.message: This device does not support DIY effects.

unknown_kind_not_saveable.message: This effect type cannot be saved.

scene_name_collision.message: That name matches a built-in scene. Choose a different name.

duplicate_name.message: An effect with that name already exists.

update_needs_name_or_content.message: Provide a new name or content to update.

too_many_segment_brightness.message: Too many segment brightness values were provided.

segment_brightness_range.message: Segment brightness must be from 0 to 100.

too_many_segments.message: The effect contains more segments than this device supports.

bad_rgb.message: A segment colour is not a valid RGB colour.

vibrant_stops_range.message: A gradient needs 2 to 5 colour stops.

vibrant_bad_rgb.message: A gradient stop is not a valid RGB colour.

sketch_bad_background.message: The Sketch background is not a valid RGB colour.

sketch_motion_invalid.message: The Sketch motion is not supported.

sketch_speed_range.message: Sketch speed must be from 0 to 100.

sketch_brightness_range.message: Sketch brightness must be from 0 to 100.

flat_family_variant_invalid.message: The Flat family and variant combination is not supported.

flat_speed_range.message: Flat speed must be from 0 to 100.

palette_too_large.message: The effect palette contains too many colours.

flat_bad_rgb.message: A Flat palette entry is not a valid RGB colour.

combo_speed_range.message: Combo speed must be from 0 to 100.

combo_empty.message: Combo requires at least one effect step.

combo_too_many.message: Combo accepts up to four effect steps.

combo_family_variant_invalid.message: A Combo step uses an unsupported Flat family and variant.

combo_palette_empty.message: Combo requires at least one palette colour.

combo_bad_rgb.message: A Combo palette entry is not a valid RGB colour.

music_calm_replaced.title: Music calm switch replaced
music_calm_replaced.description: The switch {old} has been replaced by {new}. Update any automations or scripts that used the old switch to use the new music style control.

music_mode_replaced.title: Music mode select replaced
music_mode_replaced.description: The select {old} has been removed. Choose a music mode from the light's effect list instead, and update any automations or scripts that used the old select.

custom_effect_scene_shadow.title: Custom effect hides a built-in scene
custom_effect_scene_shadow.description: The saved custom effect "{effect}" has the same name as a built-in scene, so the scene can no longer be chosen from the effect list. Rename the custom effect to reach the scene again.

custom_effect_unknown_kind.title: Unsupported custom effect stored
custom_effect_unknown_kind.description: A saved custom effect uses a format this version cannot apply. It has been kept as-is but cannot be used until it is saved again.

custom_effect_unsupported_model.title: Custom effect unavailable on this device
custom_effect_unsupported_model.description: The saved custom effect "{effect}" is not validated for {model}. It has been kept for export or deletion but cannot be applied.

unsupported_model.title: Unsupported Govee model
unsupported_model.description: This config entry identifies model "{model}", which this integration cannot safely control. Reconfigure the device with a supported model.

set_video_mode.name: Set video mode
set_video_mode.description: Configure the H6199 video (camera sync) mode.

capture_region.name: Color mapping
capture_region.description: How screen colors map to strip: full or part.

full_screen.name: Use full mapping
full_screen.description: true = full mapping, false = part mapping.

sound_effects.name: Sound effects
sound_effects.description: Enable the H6199 audio-reactive video overlay.

set_music_mode.name: Set music mode
set_music_mode.description: Configure the music mode on supported models (H617A/H6199).

mode.name: Mode
mode.description: Music sub-mode: energetic, rhythm, spectrum, rolling, separation, hopping, piano keys, fountain, day and night, bloom, or shiny. 'energic' is accepted as a deprecated alias for 'energetic'.

calm.name: Calm rhythm
calm.description: Enable calm rhythm variant (rhythm mode only).

color.name: Color
color.description: Optional accent color as [R, G, B].

paint_segments.name: Paint segments
paint_segments.description: Paint one or more color groups onto the addressable segments (H617A).

groups.name: Groups
groups.description: List of {segments: [1-15], rgb_color: [R, G, B]} groups; each color is sent as one packet.

set_segment_color.name: Set segment color
set_segment_color.description: Set a single color on the given segments (1-15).

set_segment_brightness.name: Set segment brightness
set_segment_brightness.description: Set brightness on the given segments (1-15).

save_effect.name: Save effect
save_effect.description: Save the supplied effect content, or a snapshot of the current segment colours, as a named custom effect.

name.name: Name
name.description: Display name for the saved effect.

content.name: Content
content.description: Effect content object to save. Provide this or enable capture current, not both.

capture_current.name: Capture current
capture_current.description: Save a snapshot of the current segment colours instead of supplying content.

delete_effect.name: Delete effect
delete_effect.description: Delete a saved custom effect by its id or name.

id.name: Id
id.description: Stable id of the effect to delete. Provide this or the name, not both.

name.name: Name
name.description: Current name of the effect to delete. Provide this or the id, not both.

rename_effect.name: Rename effect
rename_effect.description: Rename a saved custom effect, keeping its stable id.

id.name: Id
id.description: Stable id of the effect to rename. Provide this or the current name, not both.

from_name.name: Current name
from_name.description: Current name of the effect to rename. Provide this or the id, not both.

to.name: New name
to.description: New display name for the effect.

update_effect.name: Update effect
update_effect.description: Update a saved custom effect by its stable id, changing its name, content, or both.

id.name: Id
id.description: Stable id of the effect to update.

name.name: New name
name.description: New display name for the effect. Provide a new name, new content, or both.

content.name: Content
content.description: New effect content object. Provide a new name, new content, or both.

export_effect.name: Export effect
export_effect.description: Return a portable snapshot of a saved custom effect by its stable id.

id.name: Id
id.description: Stable id of the effect to export.
